ARBITRATOR MARGARET MARY FARLEY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-02-2011 THROUGH DEC-01-2011.

LAW AND MOTION 301, INTERVENOR DHL EXPRESS (USA), INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

STIP TO EXTEND THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS REJECTED. THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY GRANTED A REQUEST TO EXTEND THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION. FURTHER REQUESTS TO EXTEND THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION REQUIRE A NOTICED MOTION IN DEPARTMENT 610; PER SFLR 4.1 (H). Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Sathitpong Lowsitisukdi, supatra Lowsitisukdi's Motion for an Order Extending the Jurisdiction of the Arbitrator is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 6/1/2012. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to 7/2/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
